name: python3-django-multiselectfield
title: python3-django-multiselectfield
summary: new model field and form field (Python 3)
description:
new model field and form field (Python 3)
This package contains a new model field and form field. With this you can get
a multiple select from a choice. It stores to the database as a CharField of
comma-separated values.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-multiselectfield because new model field and form field (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-multiselectfield as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-multiselectfield with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-multiselectfield --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
